description: Create the complete vidown-app Vite+React+TailwindCSS project with all configuration files, the App.jsx component, and install dependencies
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/package.json with dependencies: react, react-dom, lucide-react as dependencies; vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer as devDependencies
Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/postcss.config.js with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins
Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/index.html with root div and script module pointing to /src/main.jsx, title 'vIDown - Video Multi-Downloader'
Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/src/main.jsx importing React, ReactDOM, App, and index.css, rendering App in StrictMode

Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/src/index.css with @tailwind base/components/utilities directives and custom @keyframes for fadeIn (opacity 0->1 + translateY 10px->0) and scaleIn (scale 0.95->1 + opacity 0->1)

Create /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app/src/App.jsx with the full multi-platform video downloader component including: imports from lucide-react (Download, Sparkles, BookOpen, Code, History, Link2, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Play, RefreshCw, Send, FileVideo, Eye, Info, HelpCircle, Smartphone, Copy, Check, ChevronRight, Menu, X), 4 sidebar tabs (download, ai-chat, guides, developer), platform auto-detection for shopee/tiktok/instagram/facebook, mock download with progress simulation, AI chat with Gemini API (gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025 model), download history, clipboard paste, video preview, developer API section with Python code snippet, responsive mobile with hamburger menu, dark theme (slate-950)
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm install' in the vidown-app directory to install all dependencies
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build' to verify the project compiles successfully
acceptance_criteria: All project files exist at the correct paths
npm run build completes without errors and produces a dist/ directory
App.jsx contains all 4 tabs (download, ai-chat, guides, developer)
App.jsx imports all specified lucide-react icons
App.jsx includes Gemini API integration with model gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025
index.css includes fadeIn and scaleIn keyframe animations
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app && unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build' - should exit 0 and create dist/ directory
findings: App.jsx rewritten again to fix CORS issues. Now uses: TikTok via tikwm.com (works), other platforms via Cobalt API (api.cobalt.tools - supports CORS). External fallback downloaders: threads -> threadsdownloader.com, shopee -> shopeenowatermark.com, instagram -> snapinsta.app, facebook -> getmyfb.com, tiktok -> ssstik.io. Removed all unreliable CORS proxies. Push to main blocked by CI protection - PR #7 created on feat/cobalt-api-download branch.
